items.name: 宮越家離れ
items.description: 津軽地方の旧家・宮越家の離れ座敷。精緻な造作と良質な建材を用いた近代和風建築。2018年度学術調査を経て指定。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the buildings category (detached residential building). Town-designated by Nakadomari Town. Designated on 2018-12-01. Located in Nakadomari Town.

items.name: 宮越家庭園
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 宮越家敷地内の日本庭園「静川園」。大型の灯籠や石組みが特徴的な庭園。

en.description_en: A place of scenic beauty (garden). Town-designated by Nakadomari Town. Designated on 2018-12-01. Located in Nakadomari Town.

items.name: 宮越家主屋
items.description: 宮越家の主屋。明治から大正期の建築とされる大型旧家住宅。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the buildings category (main house). Town-designated by Nakadomari Town. Designated on 2020-07-01. Located in Nakadomari Town.

items.name: 宮越家文庫蔵
items.description: 宮越家の文庫蔵。書籍・文書類を収蔵した土蔵。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the buildings category (archive storehouse). Town-designated by Nakadomari Town. Designated on 2020-07-01. Located in Nakadomari Town.

items.name: 宮越家米蔵
items.description: 宮越家の米蔵。農業経営を行った旧家の穀物保管蔵。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the buildings category (rice storehouse). Town-designated by Nakadomari Town. Designated on 2020-07-01. Located in Nakadomari Town.
